subject: fix(tooltip): prevent stuck tooltips on mobile touch devices
body:
Touch devices fire mouseEnter on tap but never fire mouseLeave,
leaving tooltip portals stuck on screen. Skip showing tooltips
entirely on touch devices since hover previews are meaningless
without a cursor.

Tags: ui, mobile, tooltip
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
